searchify.config.title: Searchify Settings
searchify.config.category.general.toolti: Main parameters for item searching and highlighting.
searchify.config.enabled.name: Enable Mod
searchify.config.enabled.desc: Fully enables or disables the item search and hiding logic.
searchify.config.displayMode.name: Highlight Mode
searchify.config.displayMode.desc:
Choose how items are visualized during a search.

§lPop-out Animation§r - Spring-like shrinking of hidden items.
§lTexture§r - Dark texture overlay on hidden items.
§lColor§r - Colored background for matched items.
§lOutline§r - Colored outline around matched items.
§lScale Animation§r - Pulsating enlargement of matched items.
§lTransparency§r - Semi-transparency applied to unmatched items.
searchify.config.animationSpeed.name: Animation Speed (%)
searchify.config.animationSpeed.desc: Determines the speed of the §lPop-out§r and §lScale§r animations.
searchify.config.highlightColor.name: Highlight Color
searchify.config.highlightColor.desc: Color used for the §lColor§r and §lOutline§r display modes.
searchify.config.ghostAlpha.name: Transparency Level (%)
searchify.config.ghostAlpha.desc: Adjusts the opacity of unmatched items in the §lTransparency§r mode.
searchify.config.pulseScale.name: Scale Animation Strength (%)
searchify.config.pulseScale.desc: Adjusts the maximum size increase for the §lScale§r animation mode.
searchify.config.autoLock.name: Lock Search Box
searchify.config.autoLock.desc: If enabled, the search box will be locked open by default and will remember your text even after restarting the game.
searchify.config.category.guis.tooltip: Configure which screens will display the search bar.
searchify.config.chest.desc: Show the search bar in the §lChest§r interface.
searchify.config.barrel.desc: Show the search bar in the §lBarrel§r interface.
searchify.config.enderChest.desc: Show the search bar in the §lEnder Chest§r interface.
searchify.config.trappedChest.desc: Show the search bar in the §lTrapped Chest§r interface.
searchify.config.copperChest.desc: Show the search bar in the §lCopper Chest§r interface.
searchify.config.shulkerBox.desc: Show the search bar in the §lShulker Box§r interface.
searchify.config.searchInside.name: Search Inside Containers
searchify.config.searchInside.desc: If enabled, the search will also check the contents of shulker boxes and bundles present in the inventory.
searchify.config.keybind.name: Fast Search Keybind
searchify.config.keybind.desc: Press this key while hovering over an item to automatically insert its name into the search bar.
searchify.config.enableHistory.name: Search History
searchify.config.enableHistory.desc: Displays a history button next to the search bar to quickly access your §llast 5 queries§r.
searchify.config.searchInPlayerInventory: If enabled, the search will highlight items in both the opened container and your own inventory.
searchify.config.autoFocusSearchBar.name: Auto-Focus Search Bar
searchify.config.autoFocusSearchBar.desc: Automatically opens and focuses the search bar when opening a container, allowing you to type immediately.
